title: AI Evaluation
description: Create and manage evaluation topics for AI-assisted grading

creator.my_topics_description: Manage your evaluation topics, edit questions and settings.
creator.statistics_description: View respondent counts, completion rates, and other statistics.

respondent.my_answers_description: View your answer history and submission records.
respondent.my_reports_description: View grading reports and feedback you received.
respondent.progress_description: View your answering progress and completion status.

grader.tasks_description: View pending grading tasks and execute AI-assisted grading.
grader.pending_tasks_description: View tasks that need your grading or review.
grader.completed_tasks_description: View your completed grading tasks and reports.
grader.publish_description: Publish grading reports for respondents to view.

topics.title: Topics
topics.browse_description: View and search evaluation topics, answer questions, and check your results.
topics.create_description: Create a new evaluation topic with questions and grading criteria.
topics.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this topic? This action cannot be undone.
topics.name: Topic Name
topics.create_first: Create your first topic to get started
topics.public_description: Anyone can view and answer questions in this topic
topics.private_description: Only invited users can view and answer questions
topics.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this topic?
topics.version_description: View published versions of this topic and their question snapshots.
topics.publish_hint: Publish at least one question before publishing the topic
topics.instructions_placeholder: Enter exam instructions in Markdown format. These will be shown to respondents before they start answering.
topics.instructions_hint: Supports Markdown formatting. Leave empty to use no instructions for this topic.
topics.exam_mode_enabled: This topic will be displayed as an exam with timer and enhanced UI

versions.rollback_description: Are you sure you want to rollback to version {{version}}? This will restore the topic to the state at that version. Your current changes will not be lost, but the active version will change.
versions.rollback_success_description: Topic has been rolled back to version {{version}}

questions.title: Questions
questions.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this question? This action cannot be undone.
questions.delete_description: The question and related answer records will be permanently deleted.
questions.drag_drop_hint: Drag & drop files or click to browse
questions.instructions_placeholder: Enter question-specific instructions in Markdown format. If set, these override the topic-level instructions.
questions.instructions_hint: Leave empty to use the topic-level instructions.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Manage who can view, answer, and grade your topics.
permissions.remove_description: Are you sure you want to revoke this permission?

answers.title: Answers
answers.content_required: Please enter your answer or upload attachments
answers.submit_hint: Upload your answer files. You can also use the text input for additional notes.
answers.show_text_input_hint: If you cannot upload files, you can use the text input (not recommended)
answers.upload_recommended: File upload is the recommended submission method
answers.upload_drag_hint: Drag & drop files here or click to browse
answers.confirm_submit_description: This will overwrite your previous submission. Are you sure you want to continue?
answers.new_version_available: A new version of this question is available. You may want to re-answer.

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Please read the following carefully before answering:
instructions.no_custom_instructions: No specific instructions for this question.
instructions.default_notice: Please follow the submission requirements carefully.
instructions.submission_notice: You can modify your submission multiple times. The system will keep your latest answer.
instructions.version_notice: If the question is updated, you will need to re-answer based on the latest version.

answers.upload_format_hint: Supports PDF, Word, images, and other common formats

grading.title: Grading
grading.description: View and manage AI grading tasks for this topic.
grading.retry_hint: Click retry to re-execute the grading task
grading.upload_report_description: Upload a custom report file as the final grading result
grading.report_not_published: This report has not been published yet.
grading.report_not_found: Report not found or has been removed.
grading.view_execution_task_hint: View detailed execution log for debugging
grading.publish_ai_as_final_hint: Publish the AI grading result as the final report
grading.select_team_description: Select an AI team to perform automatic grading for answers.
grading.no_team_warning: Without an AI team, answers will need to be graded manually.
grading.no_group_teams: No group teams available. Please create a group team for grading.
grading.auto_trigger_description: Configure when to automatically trigger AI grading.
grading.enable_auto_trigger_hint: Automatically start AI grading when answers are submitted
grading.timeout_description: Set the maximum time allowed for AI grading tasks.

exam.title: Assessment
exam.exam_mode_description: This topic will be conducted as an exam with time limits and an enhanced interface.
exam.waiting_start: Exam will start soon, please wait...

upload.title: Submit Materials
upload.main_report_hint: Supports PDF, Word, TXT formats, up to 20 files
upload.interaction_hint: Supports PDF, images, text formats, up to 20 files
upload.bonus_agent_hint: Supports images, PDF, documents, up to 20 files
upload.bonus_multimodal_hint: Supports PPTX, PDF, images, MP4 formats, up to 20 files
upload.click_or_drag: Click to select or drag files here

supplementary.title: Supplementary Notes
supplementary.placeholder: Please enter your supplementary notes here...
supplementary.hint_1: Please supplement your overall approach to completing the answer with AI, and the models and tools used, for example:
supplementary.hint_2: Which models or platforms were used, whether different models or tools were switched at different stages, which steps they were used for, and whether there were other reference sources or auxiliary tools.
supplementary.hint_3: You can also add other information that you think can demonstrate your AI usage ideas and techniques.

submit.title: Submit Checklist
submit.file_limit: Total attachments per question cannot exceed 20, currently uploaded {{count}}

confirm.title: Confirm Submission
confirm.description: Please confirm the following submission content is correct

modal.end_description: After ending answering, you will enter the review phase and will no longer be able to modify your answers.
modal.end_warning: This action cannot be undone. Please confirm you have completed all answers.
modal.leave_description: After leaving the exam, the assessment will end and you will no longer be able to view or modify your answers.
modal.leave_hint: Please confirm you have completed all checks and are ready to submit.

success.title: Submission Successful
success.description: Assessment materials have been submitted successfully.

phase.qa_description: Please read the exam instructions carefully and click start when ready

errors.please_login: Please login before accessing this page
